name: summarize_text
description: Generates a concise, coherent summary of a long piece of text while preserving its key ideas and conclusions.

text.description: The full text content to summarize. Should be at least 100 characters.

max_length.description: Maximum length of the summary in words. Defaults to 100.

style.description: Desired output format for the summary. Defaults to 'paragraph'.

focus.description: Optional topic or aspect to emphasise in the summary, e.g. 'financial implications'.
